brief.title: The Stack Trap: Why Solo Founders Keep Rebuilding Instead of Shipping
brief.angle: Personal confession + actionable warning about perfectionism in tech choices
brief.target_audience: Solo founders and indie hackers building their first product
key_points: The temptation to chase perfect tech stacks
A simple framework for 'good enough' decisions
My personal story of wasted weeks
brief.cta: What's your stack trap? Reply and I'll share my 'ship it' checklist.
